packages.name: examples
packages.description: Factory example workflows used to validate local authoring, iteration, and publish pipeline behavior.

packages.name: github
packages.description: GitHub public REST API workflows focused on unauthenticated endpoints for metadata, user and repository discovery.

packages.name: netlify
packages.description: Comprehensive Netlify API workflows generated from OpenAPI, including sites, deploys, builds, DNS, forms, accounts, and team operations.

packages.name: stripe
packages.description: Comprehensive Stripe workflows generated from Stripe OpenAPI with lowerCamel refs.

packages.name: twilio
packages.description: Twilio mobile messaging workflows for sending SMS/MMS, checking delivery status, and listing message activity.
